rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors
Use AGREE logical operators and implication for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence
Branching logic should use nested `if ... then ... else`
Use AGREE logical operators such as `and`, `or`, `not(...)`, and implication `=>`
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract
Do not use invalid helper declarations or unresolved identifiers in guarantees
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
